feedback.text: As an old gamer i can say the gaming market has been getting more and more anti consumer, and anti owning. They say we buy our games but we don't own them. They can take away our right to play games we paid for and games are not cheap. We need EU to protect consumers from anti consumer practice, And they need to make a way for us to play games offline and i know they cant i have been coding most of my life and even online games can be made to play offline the gaming company already have the means to to test the online game on a local machine. Back in my young days all the multiplayer games came with a server executable by default. But the gaming corporation stopped doing that to take control over how many years we can play our games, and make us even pay for renting servers from them taking even more money from us its pure greed. I own my own server but i cant host the multiplayer games i paid for to play with friends anymore. Also we need you to support stop killing games. Its wary important to us gamers that games don't get lost so next generations can try the great games. We games hope you will help us defend the right to own what we have paid for and not just a license. If they want to only give us a license to the game it should not be put up as buying, but as renting that is what we are doing when we do not own the games. Game companies has to state its only renting and has to give end of life dates. Or make so we can play our games after they stopped supporting it and they don't have responsibility over that game anymore and cant be sued
